description: Leartech preset for Rust services. Layer on top of default.json — adds groups for the leartech-rust-runtime base image and the leartech-common crate (git-tagged dep until a private cargo registry exists).

packageRules.description: Auto-merge leartech-rust-runtime image bumps as soon as they land. 'at any time' overrides default Monday-only schedule — internal lib, low risk, but consumers can be blocked on it (e.g. fleet rust-1.x bump).

Auto-merge leartech-common (Rust common library, distributed via git tag) as soon as it lands. 'at any time' overrides default Monday-only schedule because internal libs may need to flow within hours.
